videos.title: Why Most People Stay Broke Their Entire Lives - Robert Kiyosaki
info: What to know about money at 25 is rarely taught in school—but it determines your financial future. In this solo episode of the Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki shares the lessons he would give his younger self after decades of building, losing, and rebuilding wealth.
advice: Robert explains that traditional education prepares people to become employees, not investors. Schools teach skills for earning a paycheck but ignore financial intelligence—leaving most people dependent on income instead of building assets.
warning: He challenges one of the most accepted beliefs about money: that a steady paycheck equals security. Instead, Robert argues that relying on a paycheck creates dependency and limits long-term wealth. True financial freedom comes from owning assets that generate income without requiring
videos.key_idea: Why Most People Stay Broke Their Entire Lives - Robert Kiyosaki
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

info: 👉 https://bit.ly/3HLA8ql 👈 CLICK HERE Ready to change your financial future? Join Tom Wheelwright, Robert Kiyosaki's CPA, and apply to the WealthAbility Accelerator today!
advice: Nothing compares to the power of social media and how it can grow your audience, business, and revenue exponentially. But what are the steps to creating successful social media content that is unique and engaging? Join Tom Wheelwright as he discusses how you can build your own social media content strategy with his guest, Joshua Lessard.
warning: Joshua helps successful businesses transform their YouTube and social medias into engines that attract clients, talent, and new opportunities.

videos.title: Why Asia Is Booming While America Struggles - Robert Kiyosaki, Richard Duncan
info: Visit www.richardduncaneconomics.com Use Code CRASH to receive 50% off Your Subsription
advice: Why the US dollar is losing value is one of the most important questions investors must understand today. In this episode of the Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki sits down with economist Richard Duncan to explain how the global financial system evolved—and why it is becoming increasingly unstable.
warning: Richard explains that the turning point came in 1971, when the US dollar was taken off the gold standard. This shift allowed the United States to expand credit without limits, transforming the economy from one based on savings and production into one driven by debt and consumption.
videos.key_idea: Why Asia Is Booming While America Struggles - Robert Kiyosaki, Richard Duncan
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.
